violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Front display case at 49F.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Store paper towels up off of floor.
Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. -Need above supplies in dry storage.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Equipment/utensil was not air-dried or allowed adequate draining after sanitizing. -Need to dry on rack not on rubber mat.
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
